name: St. Anne'S
description_short: St. Anne's Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, and deposit products to its community members.
description_long:
St. Anne's Credit Union operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial cooperative serving its community. As a credit union, it is NCUA-insured and structured to prioritize member benefits over shareholder profits, distinguishing it from traditional for-profit banks. The institution has established itself through community engagement, emphasizing charitable donations and local partnerships as core to its mission.

St. Anne's provides a comprehensive suite of consumer lending and deposit products. Their mortgage offerings include 5/1 Adjustable Rate Mortgages (currently at 4.990% interest rate, 5.734% APR) along with traditional home financing options. Auto loans are prominently featured with dealer search integration for pre-approval financing. Additional services include personal loans, home equity products, and deposit accounts (CD/IRA offerings). The credit union also supports business banking alongside personal banking services.

The credit union emphasizes digital accessibility with online banking enrollment, e-statements, loan applications, and mobile functionality. Their website indicates bilingual support (Portuguese and Spanish screen reader capabilities), suggesting community diversity awareness. The institution positions itself as community-focused through transparent communication about external partner sites and privacy policies, reflecting cooperative values.

St. Anne's appears to be a legitimate, established credit union with standard product offerings. However, the website content provided is limited in scope, offering no specific information about membership requirements, fee structures, minimum account balances, rates on savings products, or competitive positioning. Prospective members should directly contact the institution or visit in-person to understand full membership eligibility, current rates across all products, and specific terms.
services: Auto loans with dealer search integration
pros: NCUA-insured member deposits providing federal insurance protection
Offers 5/1 ARM mortgages with competitive rate disclosure (4.990% current rate)
Integrated auto loan pre-approval with dealer search functionality
Community-focused with stated charitable partnerships and local giving programs
Digital banking including online account opening and e-statements
Member-owned structure means profits potentially benefit members rather than external shareholders
cons: Limited rate transparency on website—only ARM mortgage rate disclosed, no rates shown for other products
No information provided about membership eligibility requirements or restrictions
Website lacks fee schedule, minimum balance requirements, or product comparison details
No mention of APY/rates for savings accounts, CDs, or IRAs despite listing these products
Minimal online presence for member reviews or third-party ratings visible on provided content
best_for: Community members seeking member-owned, non-profit lending alternatives
Borrowers wanting NCUA-insured checking and savings with personal loan access
Homebuyers interested in mortgage pre-qualification with community bank experience
Auto buyers seeking pre-approved financing tied to local dealership networks
diagnosis: St. Anne's is best for community members seeking traditional credit union services including mortgages, auto loans, and savings products backed by NCUA insurance. The primary caveat is lack of transparency on current rates for most products, fees, and membership requirements—prospective members must contact the institution directly to compare offerings against other credit unions and banks.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: St. Anne's — Credit Union in Fall River, MA | CreditDoc
meta_description: St. Anne's — NCUA-insured credit union in Fall River, MA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
